subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 749191601/240928199 is not a GRB
body:
P. Veres (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 749191601/240928199 at 04:46:36.23 UT
on 28 September 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
